calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Deborah Schweizer; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Christine Moyer, is present.
Attorney, Larry Curtice, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-19-09 is vacated.
